attributes.description: PC Jeweller is engaged in the business of manufacturing, sale and trading of gold jewellery, diamond-studded jewellery and silver items and operates in different geographical areas. The Company’s export business of gold jewellery is on a B2B basis through its dealers based in the Gulf via Dubai based firms. [1] The company has a team of in-house designers.
